code_issues.issue: Hardcoded PostgreSQL version 'postgres:16-alpine' may not match production environment
code_issues.fix: Consider making image version configurable via environment variable or const

code_issues.issue: TruncateAllTables has hardcoded table list that may get out of sync with migrations
code_issues.fix: Generate table list dynamically from information_schema or add comment to keep in sync

code_issues.issue: init() function with log statement adds noise to test output
code_issues.fix: Remove or make conditional on verbose flag

missing_items: Unit tests for testutil package itself (though less critical for test utilities)
Configuration option for PostgreSQL container image version
